title: mentha royleana var. afghanica
intro: Mentha royleana var. afghanica, also known as Afghan peppermint, is a variant of the Mentha royleana plant species, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains high levels of menthone and menthyl acetate, making it useful for digestive issues and headaches. The health benefits of Afghan peppermint include its ability to alleviate nausea, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from stress and anxiety. Afghan peppermint can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including indigestion and fever.
